subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto the Desired One of the world, Who hath graciously and befittingly illumined His chosen ones with the resplendent light of the Day-Star of Divine Unity [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقصود عالم را لایق و سزا که اولیای خود را بانوار نیر توحید منور فرمود و
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @knowledge; recognition of God, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @unity; oneness of humanity, @justice ['adl]; social justice and divine justice
